sqlReaderQuery.value:
select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.[text]
,ap.isLiked
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.AuditId
,ap.hcAssessmentPreferenceTypeId
,ap.childProfileId
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 		 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcChildProfilePreference t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select -- ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.childProfileId
,ap.dateCreated
,ap.createdBy
,ap.dateLastModified
,ap.modifiedBy
,ap.dateDeleted
,ap.referringProviderId
,ap.isDefault
,ap.DeletedBy 
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 			 
inner join ChildProfile p on (ap.childprofileid=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcChildProfileReferringProvider t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select-- hc.* 
hc.Id
,hc.childProfileId
,hc.memberId
,hc.hcStaffAssignmentType
,hc.DateCreated
,hc.DateLastModified
,hc.DateDeleted
,hc.ModifiedBy
,hc.DeletedBy
,hc.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} hc
 inner join dbo.ChildProfile c  on (hc.childprofileid=c.id)
 inner join accountinfo a on (c.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcChildProfileStaffMember t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select-- h.* 
h.id
,h.accountInfoId
,h.[name]
,h.ClientsAreInactive
,h.CreatedBy
,h.ModifiedBy
,h.DateCreated
,h.DateLastModified
,h.DateDeleted
,h.IsDemo
,h.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} h
inner join accountinfo a on (h.accountinfoid=a.id)
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join Temp_hcClientStatus t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL

select t1.* from (select --ef.* 
distinct
ef.id
,ef.accountInfoId
,ef.hcElementTypeId
,ef.[name]
,ef.DateCreated
,ef.DateLastModified
,ef.DateDeleted
,ef.ModifiedBy
,ef.DeletedBy
,ef.CreatedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ef 
inner join AccountInfo A on ef.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_hcElementField t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --efv.*
efv.id
,efv.hcElementFieldId
,efv.hcFormFieldId
,efv.[name]
,efv.[value]
,efv.CreatedBy
,efv.ModifiedBy
,efv.DateCreated
,efv.DateLastModified
,efv.DateDeleted
,efv.DeletedBy
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} efv
inner join hcElementField ef on efv.hcElementFieldId = ef.ID
inner join AccountInfo A on ef.AccountInfoID = A.ID
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
 )t1
left join hcElementFieldValues t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.accountInfoId
,ap.component
,ap.caption
,ap.[group]
,ap.[description]
,ap.placeholder
,ap.[required]
,ap.editable
,ap.[custom]
,ap.[index]
,ap.multipleInput
,ap.noInput
,ap.multiSelect
,ap.hasOptionValues
,ap.[validation]
,ap.isDefault
,ap.templateUrl
,ap.popoverTemplateUrl
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.IncludeSummaryForGoals
,ap.numberOfRows
,ap.numberOfCols
,ap.column3
,ap.column4
,ap.column5
,ap.column6
,ap.column7
,ap.column8
,ap.column9
,ap.column10
,ap.isParentSignature
,ap.IsBehaviorSupport
,ap.IsHipaa
,ap.displayOrder
,ap.IncludeGoalStatusForGoal
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.AllowRemoteParentSignature
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap 
inner join AccountInfo a on (a.ID=ap.accountInfoId  )
where ap.accountinfoid is not null
and a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')}) 
 )t1
left join Temp_hcElementFieldValues t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
select id from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name}

select t1.* from (select  --ap.* 
ap.id
,ap.hcEncounterId
,ap.hcAppointmentId
,ap.DateCreated
,ap.DateLastModified
,ap.DateDeleted
,ap.CreatedBy
,ap.ModifiedBy
,ap.DeletedBy
,ap.StartDate
from @{pipeline().parameters.Schema_Name}.@{pipeline().parameters.Table_Name} ap  
inner join dbo.hcAppointments ha on (ap.hcAppointmentId=ha.AppointmentId )
inner join dbo.ChildProfile p on (ha.clientId=p.id ) 
inner join dbo.AccountInfo a on (p.accountInfoId=a.ID )
where a.Id in (@{join(pipeline().globalParameters.AccountID, ',')})
)t1
left join Temp_hcEncounterAppointmentLink t2 on t1.Id = t2.ID
WHERE t2.ID IS NULL
